subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast embodied the attainment of grace in the assembly of manifestation, render thanks unto thy Lord, He Who hath manifested Himself upon the Sinai of Revelation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تمثل بالحصول علی الفیض فی محفل التجلی فاشکرن ربک المتجلی فی سیناء الظهور
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
